syntax_11810.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11810.title: Block LabyAddon
syntax_11810.description: Adds the addon to the list which then can be sent to the player via another syntax
syntax_11810.syntax_pattern: add addon with id %string% to blocked list

en: Adds the addon to the list which then can be sent to the player via another syntax

syntax_11811.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11811.title: Send Disabled Addons
syntax_11811.description: Send the disabled addons to the player which can be added via another syntax

en: Send the disabled addons to the player which can be added via another syntax

syntax_12288.creator: pqtriick
syntax_12288.title: Get Blocked Addons
syntax_12288.description: Returns all blocked addons that have been added via the block addons syntax.

en: Returns all blocked addons that have been added via the block addons syntax.

syntax_12289.creator: pqtriick
syntax_12289.title: Get Remaining Mute Time
syntax_12289.description: Returns the remaining mute time (Integer) in minutes. If the player isn't muted, the variable will return <none>

en: Returns the remaining mute time (Integer) in minutes. If the player isn't muted, the variable will return <none>

syntax_12290.creator: pqtriick
syntax_12290.title: Get Mute Reason
syntax_12290.description: Returns the given reason when the player got muted via the Voicechat mute Syntax. Will return <none> if the player isn't muted.

en: Returns the given reason when the player got muted via the Voicechat mute Syntax. Will return <none> if the player isn't muted.

syntax_11947.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11947.title: Mute Player
syntax_11947.description: Mutes the player from the voicechat for the given reason and time (Only works if the player isn't already muted)
syntax_11947.syntax_pattern: mute %player% from voice chat due to %string% for %integer% minutes

en: Mutes the player from the voicechat for the given reason and time (Only works if the player isn't already muted)

syntax_11948.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11948.title: Unmute Player
syntax_11948.description: Unmutes the player from voice chat  (Only works if the player is muted)

en: Unmutes the player from voice chat  (Only works if the player is muted)

syntax_11460.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11460.title: Send Addon Recommendation
syntax_11460.description: Sends a request to the player which shows optimal or required addons to play on the server. This works only for offical published LabyMod Addons
syntax_11460.syntax_pattern: send addon with id %string% to be ("required"/"optional") to %player%

en: Sends a request to the player which shows optimal or required addons to play on the server. This works only for offical published LabyMod Addons

syntax_12914.creator: pqtriick
syntax_12914.title: Add Default Laby RPC
syntax_12914.description: Edits the default LabyMod Discord RPC with custom Title

en: Edits the default LabyMod Discord RPC with custom Title

syntax_12915.creator: pqtriick
syntax_12915.title: Add Discord RPC with end time
syntax_12915.description: Edits the default LabyMod Discord RPC with custom Title and an end time
syntax_12915.syntax_pattern: create Discord RPC named %string% with end time of %integer% minutes for %player%

en: Edits the default LabyMod Discord RPC with custom Title and an end time

syntax_12916.creator: pqtriick
syntax_12916.title: Add Laby RPC with timer
syntax_12916.description: Edits the default LabyMod Discord RPC with custom Title and a new timer
syntax_12916.syntax_pattern: create Discord RPC named %string% with timer for %player%

en: Edits the default LabyMod Discord RPC with custom Title and a new timer

syntax_12917.creator: pqtriick
syntax_12917.title: Reset Laby RPC
syntax_12917.description: Resets the Discord RPC to laby default

en: Resets the Discord RPC to laby default

syntax_11464.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11464.title: Remove Subtitle
syntax_11464.description: Removes the subtitle of the player if one is present.

en: Removes the subtitle of the player if one is present.

syntax_11466.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11466.title: Labymod Join Event
syntax_11466.description: With this event you can check if the player is using labymod and use all kind of related labymod stuff like the playing gamemode expression

en: With this event you can check if the player is using labymod and use all kind of related labymod stuff like the playing gamemode expression

syntax_12539.creator: pqtriick
syntax_12539.title: Set marker send type
syntax_12539.description:
Sets how the markers (when the player sends one) will be handled on the server.

Valid types:

FRIENDS
BLOCKED

FRIENDS -> Normal behavior, the markers will be sent to all labymod friends of the player.
BLOCKED -> No one on the server will recieve the marker even when they are friends with the player.
syntax_12539.syntax_pattern: set marker send type of %player% to %string%

en:
Sets how the markers (when the player sends one) will be handled on the server.

Valid types:

FRIENDS
BLOCKED

FRIENDS -> Normal behavior, the markers will be sent to all labymod friends of the player.
BLOCKED -> No one on the server will recieve the marker even when they are friends with the player.

syntax_12540.creator: pqtriick
syntax_12540.title: Send marker at location
syntax_12540.description:
This Effect "summons" an marker at the given location on the server for everyone that has markers active in their options.

Parameters:
%player% - The player that will recieve the summoned marker (Can also be loop-players)

1st %integer% - The x-Position of the marker
2nd %integer% - The y-Position of the marker
3rd %integer% - The z-Position of the marker

en:
This Effect "summons" an marker at the given location on the server for everyone that has markers active in their options.

Parameters:
%player% - The player that will recieve the summoned marker (Can also be loop-players)

1st %integer% - The x-Position of the marker
2nd %integer% - The y-Position of the marker
3rd %integer% - The z-Position of the marker

syntax_11989.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11989.title: Create Input Prompt
syntax_11989.description:
Create a LabyMod input prompt. This effect only creates the prompt and does not automatically open it for the player.
If another input prompt with the same ID is created the old one gets deleted.

Valid Colornames: BLACK, DARK\_BLUE, DARK\_GREEN, DARK\_AQUA, DARK\_RED, DARK\_PURPLE, GOLD, GRAY, DARK\_GRAY, BLUE, GREEN, AQUA, RED, LIGHT\_PURPLE, YELLOW; WHITE

Valid Decoration: OBFUSCATED, BOLD, STRIKETHROUGH, UNDERLINED, ITALIC
syntax_11989.syntax_pattern: create new input prompt with id %string% with colorname %string%, decoration %string% and placeholder %string% with default value %string% and maximum length %integer%

en:
Create a LabyMod input prompt. This effect only creates the prompt and does not automatically open it for the player.
If another input prompt with the same ID is created the old one gets deleted.

Valid Colornames: BLACK, DARK\_BLUE, DARK\_GREEN, DARK\_AQUA, DARK\_RED, DARK\_PURPLE, GOLD, GRAY, DARK\_GRAY, BLUE, GREEN, AQUA, RED, LIGHT\_PURPLE, YELLOW; WHITE

Valid Decoration: OBFUSCATED, BOLD, STRIKETHROUGH, UNDERLINED, ITALIC

syntax_11990.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11990.title: Open Inputprompt
syntax_11990.description: Opens the input prompt with the specific id for the player if it was created before.

en: Opens the input prompt with the specific id for the player if it was created before.

syntax_11991.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11991.title: Get Player Input
syntax_11991.description: Returns the input value after clicking the submit button of the input prompt. The value will be saved internally until the player sends another input or the server restarts / reloads.

en: Returns the input value after clicking the submit button of the input prompt. The value will be saved internally until the player sends another input or the server restarts / reloads.

syntax_11461.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11461.title: Send to Server
syntax_11461.description: Sends the player to another server. The preview shows additional Informations like the Server's Server Icon and MOTD

en: Sends the player to another server. The preview shows additional Informations like the Server's Server Icon and MOTD

syntax_11463.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11463.title: Set Subtitle
syntax_11463.description:
Sets the subtitle of the player to the given text and size.
Accepted Sizes: 0.8 - 1.6 (0.8 Is Minecraft Default Size)
syntax_11463.syntax_pattern: set the subtitle of %player% to %string% with size %double% for %player%

en:
Sets the subtitle of the player to the given text and size.
Accepted Sizes: 0.8 - 1.6 (0.8 Is Minecraft Default Size)

syntax_11459.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11459.title: Send playing gamemode
syntax_11459.description: Shows the playing gamemode to all LabyMod friends in the top right corner if activated in the player's profile settings.
syntax_11459.syntax_pattern: make %player% send playing gamemode with name %string%

en: Shows the playing gamemode to all LabyMod friends in the top right corner if activated in the player's profile settings.

syntax_11462.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11462.title: Send Server Banner
syntax_11462.description:
Sends a Server Banner to the player which is displayed over the Tablist.
Recommended Resolution: 5:1 // 1280x256
Note: You need to copy the picture address (which mostly ends with .png oder .jpeg)

en:
Sends a Server Banner to the player which is displayed over the Tablist.
Recommended Resolution: 5:1 // 1280x256
Note: You need to copy the picture address (which mostly ends with .png oder .jpeg)

syntax_11465.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11465.title: Set Economy display
syntax_11465.description: Sets the cash and bank display in the top right corner of the screen with a smooth transition for the player.
syntax_11465.syntax_pattern: set cash display to %integer% and bank display to %integer% for %player%

en: Sets the cash and bank display in the top right corner of the screen with a smooth transition for the player.

syntax_11487.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11487.title: Create NPC
syntax_11487.description:
Creates a valid NPC for playing LabyMod Emotes.
The created NPC is created via Citizens which means that it can be used with the features of the Citizens Plugin.

Note: Every NPC needs to have an other ID!
syntax_11487.syntax_pattern: create npc with name %string% with skin of %string% with id %integer% at %player%

en:
Creates a valid NPC for playing LabyMod Emotes.
The created NPC is created via Citizens which means that it can be used with the features of the Citizens Plugin.

Note: Every NPC needs to have an other ID!

syntax_11488.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11488.title: Play random laby emote
syntax_11488.description:
Plays a random LabyMod Emote for the NPC with given ID. 
NPC needs to be created via the Create NPC Effect and also needs a valid ID.
syntax_11488.syntax_pattern: play random laby emote for npc with id %integer% for %player%

en:
Plays a random LabyMod Emote for the NPC with given ID. 
NPC needs to be created via the Create NPC Effect and also needs a valid ID.

syntax_11563.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11563.title: Send Actions to player
syntax_11563.description:
Send the actions which can be added with the add action syntax to the given player

Important: If the server is getting restarted / Stopped or the player is getting kicked / leaves then all actions which have been added to the player will be deleted.

en:
Send the actions which can be added with the add action syntax to the given player

Important: If the server is getting restarted / Stopped or the player is getting kicked / leaves then all actions which have been added to the player will be deleted.

syntax_11561.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11561.title: Add / Remove Actions
syntax_11561.description:
Adds / Removes actions from the action menu for the player.
This Syntax ONLY ADDS actions. TO send actions to the player you need to use another syntax!!
It is important to use one of the following action types, otherwise it won't work:

CLIPBOARD
RUN\_COMMAND
SUGGEST\_COMMAND
OPEN\_BROWSER

This Action also has an inbuilt detection for duplication of elements
(Remove feature doesn't work for version 1.8 Sorry!)
syntax_11561.syntax_pattern: (add|remove) action with name %string% and value %string% as type %string% for %player%

en:
Adds / Removes actions from the action menu for the player.
This Syntax ONLY ADDS actions. TO send actions to the player you need to use another syntax!!
It is important to use one of the following action types, otherwise it won't work:

CLIPBOARD
RUN\_COMMAND
SUGGEST\_COMMAND
OPEN\_BROWSER

This Action also has an inbuilt detection for duplication of elements
(Remove feature doesn't work for version 1.8 Sorry!)

syntax_11560.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11560.title: Send country flag
syntax_11560.description:
Sends the country flag from the given player to the other player(s). Will show in tablist and at above player's head the flag of their country.

!! Doesn't work on localhost server !!

en:
Sends the country flag from the given player to the other player(s). Will show in tablist and at above player's head the flag of their country.

!! Doesn't work on localhost server !!

syntax_11489.creator: pqtriick
syntax_11489.title: Play laby emote
syntax_11489.description:
Plays the given LabyMod Emote for the NPC with given ID. 
NPC needs to be created via the Create NPC Effect and also needs a valid ID.

List of valid Emotes: https://docs.labymod.net/pages/server/labymod/emote_api/
syntax_11489.syntax_pattern: play laby emote %integer% for npc with id %integer% for %player%

en:
Plays the given LabyMod Emote for the NPC with given ID. 
NPC needs to be created via the Create NPC Effect and also needs a valid ID.

List of valid Emotes: https://docs.labymod.net/pages/server/labymod/emote_api/

syntax_14318.creator: pqtriick
syntax_14318.title: Send Server Badge
syntax_14318.description: Sends the badge with the given id for the player
syntax_14318.syntax_pattern: send server badge with id %integer% to %player%

en: Sends the badge with the given id for the player

syntax_13899.creator: pqtriick
syntax_13899.title: Set Betterperspective camera state
syntax_13899.description: Sets if the given player is allowed to unlock his camera or not

en: Sets if the given player is allowed to unlock his camera or not

syntax_14031.creator: pqtriick
syntax_14031.title: Open voicechat channels
syntax_14031.description: Opens voicechat channels for the given player. Only works if the player is using the voicechat addon

en: Opens voicechat channels for the given player. Only works if the player is using the voicechat addon

syntax_14032.creator: pqtriick
syntax_14032.title: Allow / Deny Permission
syntax_14032.description: Allows / denies specific permissions for the player. Currently only autotext is implemented by the labymod server api

en: Allows / denies specific permissions for the player. Currently only autotext is implemented by the labymod server api

syntax_14033.creator: pqtriick
syntax_14033.title: Get Labymod Version of player
syntax_14033.description: Gets the current labymod version of the player.

en: Gets the current labymod version of the player.

syntax_14034.creator: pqtriick
syntax_14034.title: Get Labymod addons of player
syntax_14034.description: Gets all current installed labymod addons of the player. The namespace and the version will be displayed

en: Gets all current installed labymod addons of the player. The namespace and the version will be displayed

syntax_14316.creator: pqtriick
syntax_14316.title: Enable / Disable Laby badges
syntax_14316.description: Sets if the badges should be displayed right next of the name of the player

en: Sets if the badges should be displayed right next of the name of the player

syntax_14319.creator: pqtriick
syntax_14319.title: Create Laby badge
syntax_14319.description: Creates a new badge. The Id needs to be a number. The Color needs to be a String with a hex color in it for example "#FFFFFF".  The Image needs to be a image link  with a .png or .jpg ending
syntax_14319.syntax_pattern: create badge with id %integer% color %color% and image %string%

en: Creates a new badge. The Id needs to be a number. The Color needs to be a String with a hex color in it for example "#FFFFFF".  The Image needs to be a image link  with a .png or .jpg ending
